body.p: All company names, organization names, license names, and product names mentioned in this documentation are used for identification purposes only. A trademark is explicitly identified as registered or unregistered trademark only if required by appropriate guidelines or license terms.
This documentation is protected by copyright ${document.copyright.year}, ${organization.name}.

p.codeph: THIS DOCUMENT IS ONLY EN EXAMPLE PREPARED FOR THE SPDX DOCFEST.

THIS DOCUMENT SHOWS INFORMATION THAT WAS EXTRACTED FROM THE JBOSS/KEYCLOAK CONTAINER WITHOUT ANY FURTHER CLEARING ACTIVITIES. THE DOCUMENT IS MEANT TO CONVEY THE FIRST STEP AND KICK-START TOWARDS PROVIDING A COMPLETE AND ACCURATE SOFTWARE DISTRIBUTION ANNEX. BASED ON THE CONVEYED DETAILS FURTHER INFORMATION ON PARTS AND LICENSES CAN BE DERIVED.
